generated_oml:
// Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor mapped in the BIM model for detecting presence in rooms"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance PressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Pressure sensor integrated for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PressureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor measuring zone temperatures in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor monitoring indoor air quality levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor providing relative humidity data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LuxMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lux meter located at each lighting zone for illumination measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuxDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter collecting building electrical consumption data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance DoorContactSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Door contact sensor detecting door opening/closing events"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DoorEventDataTransmitted
]

instance WindowContactSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Window contact sensor detecting window opening/closing events"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindowEventDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientMicrophone : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient microphone network for acoustic monitoring and anomaly detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AcousticDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted from sensors
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance PressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PressureSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LuxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuxMeter
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance DoorEventDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DoorContactSensor
]

instance WindowEventDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindowContactSensor
]

instance AcousticDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientMicrophone
]

// Data instances derived from transmitted data
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time occupancy counts published every second via MQTT TLS to Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance PressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time indoor pressure readings streamed via MQTT TLS"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time temperature measurements for zone HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time CO₂ concentrations for ventilation optimisation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time humidity data for comfort analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance LuxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illumination levels collected each second for lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuxDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous energy consumption streams for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance DoorEventData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Door opening/closing events for security monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DoorEventDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance WindowEventData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Window opening/closing events for environmental control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindowEventDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance AcousticData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acoustic signals captured for anomaly detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AcousticDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

// Enabler handling twins and platform services
instance DittoTwinEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform managing device twins for all building devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, CommissioningWorkflowService, LightingOptimizationService
]

// Digital Twin Services
instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard, web and Unreal Engine 5 visualizer"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, OccupancyInsight, ComfortMetricInsight, AnomalyAlertInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics module using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) to balance energy consumption and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedEnergyConsumptionInsight, LightingSetpointRecommendationAction, FanSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and what‑if scenario execution within Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CommissioningWorkflowService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic commissioning workflow"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight, AutomaticCommissioningAction
]

instance LightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of lighting product placement and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingPlacementInsight, LightingSetpointAdjustmentAction
]

// Insights
instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard summarising consumption over time"
]

instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time occupancy heat maps"
]

instance ComfortMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quality of comfort metrics (temperature, CO₂, humidity)"
]

instance AnomalyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for anomalous readings extracted from sensor data"
]

instance PredictedEnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning predictions of future energy consumption"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results of what‑if scenarios in Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status reports for automated commissioning tasks"
]

instance LightingPlacementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations of optimal lighting fixture placement"
]

// Actions
instance LightingSetpointRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjust lighting set‑point based on RL policy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for energy savings while maintaining comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingSetpointAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update lighting dimming levels to optimise illumination"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutomaticCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execute commissioning steps automatically via Twin actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CSVExportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Export analytic reports to CSV/Excel for management review"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Models
instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "IFC model enriched with device, control, and sensor metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policy serialized as ONNX for energy‑comfort balancing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngineSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 blueprint simulation model for what‑if scenario execution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinEnabler
]

// Acting Components
instance SmartLightingFixture : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting fixture with dimmer and photometric control module"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve/damper actuator embedded in the BIM model"
]

instance BlindActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Blind actuator for automated shading control"
]

instance FanControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC fan controller exposed as actuator in the twin"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT (e.g., desired luminance levels, HVAC set‑points) are published to the corresponding Ditto device twin; Ditto propagates the command to Eclipse Hono, which sends the instruction via MQTT (or REST) to the actuator gateway; the physical actuator receives the instruction within a few seconds"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous streaming of sensor data with sub‑second latency; control loop executed at a 5‑second refresh rate; simulation and optimization runs can be scheduled at hourly or daily intervals depending on the task"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated around a central service layer that couples the Hono message broker to the Ditto twin registry; each device twin represents a physical asset; the Unreal Engine instance subscribes to Ditto topics for rendering; the optimization engine subscribes to sensor streams and publishes new set‑points to Ditto"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM creation), Construction (validation and deployment of device models), Commissioning (automation of commissioning via Hono), Operation (runtime data exchange, optimization, monitoring), Maintenance & Adaptation (continuous refinement of control policies and device models)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric used to quantify alignment between the virtual model and the physical asset; validity checks include schema validation of IFC metadata, consistency checks between Hono topic definitions and Ditto twin schemas, and statistical validation of sensor data streams; uncertainty quantified through simulation variance in Unreal Engine"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono broker implements MQTT over TLS 1.2 for sensor and command transport; Ditto devices expose REST/HTTP endpoints for twin management and WebSocket for real‑time updates; Unreal Engine connects to Ditto via a dedicated WebSocket client; building gateway bridges BACnet or Modbus to Hono using custom adapters"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of Eclipse Hono and Ditto on Kubernetes; Unreal Engine rendering server hosted on a dedicated GPU node; all services can be deployed on public cloud (AWS EKS/GKE) or on‑premises private cloud; the entire stack is orchestrated via Helm charts"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external BIM repositories via IFC import/export APIs; linkage to enterprise ERP systems for asset lifecycle data; connection to outside analytics services (e.g., cloud ML services) through REST APIs; standardised data exchange using JSON schemas"
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "All sensor data is owned by the physical asset owner; the DT provider holds a processed, anonymised derivative set subject to the PT owner’s consent; communications are encrypted using TLS and access controlled via OAuth2 and role‑based permissions"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) for BIM data, MQTT 3.1.1 over TLS for messaging, JSON schema for twin definitions, and ISO/IEC 27001‑based security controls at the middleware level"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "TLS encryption for all MQTT and HTTP traffic; authentication via JWT tokens issued by Hono; role‑based access control in Ditto; safety mechanisms such as fail‑safe default states for lighting and HVAC (e.g., fallback to 0 lux or 20 % set‑point) to prevent accidents; logging and audit trails for all command and sensor events"
]
